module decoder_5to32 (  
    input [4:0] in,  
    output reg [31:0] out  
);  
    always @(*) begin  
        out = 32'b0; // Default to all outputs low  
        out[in] = 1'b1; // Set the appropriate output high  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
